name: Small Beef Turkey
description: Not much, but it'll do. Restores 10 stamina.

name: Bundy Aftershave
description: A questionable scent that somehow wins the crowd over. Boosts crowd meter by 10 per use.

name: Cheap Energy Drink
description: A cheap backstage boost. Restores 20 stamina per use.

name: Vocal Spray
description: Keeps the voice fresh and strong. Boosts crowd meter by 15.

name: Setlist Changes
description: Switch up the setlist to keep the crowd engaged. Boosts crowd meter by 20 per use.

name: 100g Protein Bar
description: No time for a real meal. Restores 30 stamina.

name: Overdrive Serum
description: An elite performance booster. Restores 20 stamina and increases star power.

name: Holy Aftershave
description: A divine aroma that captivates the entire venue. Boosts crowd meter by 30 per use.

name: Hype Crew Call
description: Call in backup to energise the artist. Restores 35 stamina.

name: The Mysterious Beverage
description: An otherworldly drink of unknown origin. Restores 40 stamina and increases star power.

name: Divine Intervention
description: A force beyond explanation. Restores 99 stamina and massively increases star power.

name: Off-Brand Designer
description: Looks designer, probably isn't. Adds a 1.05x star power multiplier.

name: The Triangle
description: Not exactly rock and roll, but the crowd appreciates it. Adds a 1.05x crowd multiplier.

name: Autotune
description: Love it or hate it, it works. Adds a 1.1x star power multiplier.

name: Backwards Cap
description: A bold look that clicks with certain crowds. Adds a 1.1x crowd multiplier.

name: Lucky Microphone
description: Something about this mic just brings out stronger performances. Adds a 1.25x star power multiplier.

name: Mixing EQ
description: Dialled-in sound keeps the artist performing longer. Adds a 1.15x stamina multiplier.

name: Designer Clothes
description: The real deal. Looking this good commands attention. Adds a 1.2x star power multiplier.

name: Jimi Hendrix Guitar
description: You don't even have to play it. Its presence alone electrifies the crowd. Adds a 1.2x crowd multiplier.

name: Diamond Chains
description: Dripping in ice. The crowd can't look away. Adds a 1.25x star power multiplier.

name: Alien Microphone
description: Ancient and unearthly. Use with caution. Adds a 1.35x star power and crowd multiplier.

name: Michael's Glove
description: Wearing it fills you with unmatched confidence. Adds a 1.5x star power multiplier.

name: Encore Pass
description: If stamina drops below 20 after event 4, boosts crowd meter by 15.

name: Stronger Together
description: If the lineup is full, boosts crowd meter by 5 each event.

name: Good Start
description: Win the first event and gain 25 crowd meter and stamina.

name: Solid Intuition
description: Win three events in a row and your crowd meter doubles.

name: Keep My Spirit Alive
description: If an artist's stamina drops below 25, automatically recover 30 stamina.

name: I Need A Hero!
description: If crowd meter drops below 20 after event 3, the next event automatically gets the best outcome.

name: Im Still Standing
description: If any artist's stamina drops below 35, restore 25 stamina for the whole lineup.

name: High Standards
description: If crowd meter is above 70 before the final event, ticket sales are doubled.

name: Final Song Spike
description: Boosts crowd meter by 50 during the final event.

name: The Greatest To Ever Do It
description: If every artist has 3 items equipped, doubles total income.

name: Diamonds From Sierra Leone
description: Win the final event and walk away with double the income.
